violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the metal drawer has an accumulation of spilled oil. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The ceiling in the restroom area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

Handwashing sinks throughout the establishment (kitchen, bar, bathrooms) are lacking proper handwashing signage. PIC created signs during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Ashtrays were observed in the bar hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Inspector observed unopen hotdog package (dated with a best by of August 2025) with white liquid residue inside package. PIC discarded hotdogs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and pots/pans) were observed with an accumulation of food, droppings, and/or other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the bar 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The ceiling in the restroom area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The wall behind bar handwashing sink is constructed of plywood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

(2 Dr Reach In ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 45DF.No TCS foods were stored in unit at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sinks ). New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 DR reach In(interior), food storage shelves, stove hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
